verdict.summary: The change correctly converts a failed durable missed-fix marker write on the no-claim path from a silent healthy defer into a counted fix-lane error and an explicit defer reason, while preserving retry behavior and the successful-marker contention path. This makes the existing lane-health/rolling-alert machinery observe the failure without weakening lease, routing, provenance, or escalation checks. The added self-test is non-vacuous: it forces the helper failure, proves the marker attempt occurred, asserts the new reason and exact lane classification, and includes a successful-write regression control.
